scripts.build: cd frontend && npm install && npm run build -- --outDir ../dist --emptyOutDir && cd ../backend && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "require('fs').writeFileSync('dist/app.js', 'require(\"../backend/dist/app.js\");\n')"
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install
